body_html:
Hey Tatiana,

Just shooting you this quick email,
we got your request for more catering info,
and our event planner will connect shortly.

❤️ - Comeketo Catering



p.s. check out this quick video to see what's in store when you select our Brazilian BBQ Option













Love & Confetti,

🌺 Rhonna C. Ricafort
Catering Sales Manager

🔥 Eufy/Camila/ Cath
Catering Support
Comeketo Catering
📘Facebook | 📸 Instagram | 🌐 Website

Hey Tatiana,  
  
Just shooting you this quick email,  
we got your request for more catering info,  
and our event planner will connect shortly.

  
❤️ - Comeketo Catering

  

  

  

p.s. check out [this quick video](https://dom-12.wistia.com/medias/bu7v9ttoaa)
